# Dasein Foresight

> Consultora de prospectiva estrategica basada en IA para organizaciones que necesitan decidir bajo incertidumbre.

## What We Do

Dasein Foresight combines signal scanning, actor mapping, and multiagent simulation to help executive teams make strategic decisions before they become urgent. We deliver structured foresight — not opinions, not decks — actionable intelligence a board can use to decide.

## Core Methodology

1. Signal Scanning — Detect 200+ weak signals from diverse sources, filter to 40-50 relevant ones
2. Actor Mapping — Map 15-60 stakeholders, their positions, incentives, and likely moves
3. Scenario Simulation — Multiagent AI simulates how actors interact under different conditions
4. Strategic Decision Support — Deliver dashboards, dossiers, and action matrices for executive teams

## Services & Pricing (USD)

- Pulso Rapido ($2,500-$3,500, 2-3 days): Quick read on 1 decision. Memo, key signals, 3 critical questions.
- Lectura de Campo ($8,500-$12,000, 5-7 days): Full environment scan. Actor map, risk radar, 90-day plan.
- Simulacion Tactica ($16,000-$22,000, 2-3 weeks): Simulate 1 decision, 3 scenarios, interactive dashboard.
- Simulacion Estrategica ($38,000-$55,000, 5-6 weeks): Full ecosystem simulation. 12-60 actors, workshop, action matrix.
- Radar Estrategico ($10,000-$15,000/month, min 6 months): Ongoing monitoring. Monthly signal scan, quarterly re-simulation.

## Who We Serve

- Corporate strategy teams navigating regulation, competition, or market shifts
- Government and public policy teams modeling stakeholder dynamics
- Industry associations mapping ecosystem forces
- Innovation labs exploring adjacent futures

## Location & Contact

- Based in Santiago, Chile. Serving Latin America.
- Founder: Pablo Moraga (pablo@daseinfs.com)
- Phone: +56 9 3905 6565
- Website: https://www.daseinfs.com
- Booking: https://daseinforesight.zohobookings.com/#/4731633000000049054

## Technology

Built on SignalTwin, a proprietary multiagent simulation engine. Combines NLP signal processing, ontological actor modeling (inspired by Fernando Flores and Humberto Echeverria), and scenario generation through agent-based simulation.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/SalvatierraPM
